name: Chicken Salad with Grapes
recipeIngredient: 1 whole chicken, cooked, skinned, boned, meat shredded
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the shredded chicken, orange juice, mayonnaise, whipped cream, and grapes.
2. Season with sugar, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
4. To serve, arrange lettuce leaves or salad plates.
5. Top with julienned orange peel.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
